allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $token = \(cmd /c "curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ""{""""email"""":""""admin@nexus.com"""",""""password"""":""""admin123""""}"" 2>&1" | ConvertFrom-Json\).token; Write-Host "TOKEN: $token"; if \($token\) { cmd /c "curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/dashboard?start=2026-01-01^&end=2026-12-31 -H ""Authorization: Bearer $token"" 2>&1" })

PowerShell($token = \(cmd /c "curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ""{""""email"""":""""admin@nexus.com"""",""""password"""":""""admin123""""}"" 2>&1" | ConvertFrom-Json\).token; cmd /c "curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/dashboard?start=2026-01-01^&end=2026-12-31 -H ""Authorization: Bearer $token"" 2>&1")

PowerShell($port = 3001; $pid_val = \(cmd /c "netstat -ano | findstr :$port" 2>&1 | Select-String "LISTENING" | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '\\s+'\)[-1] } | Select-Object -First 1\); Write-Host "PID na porta 3001: $pid_val"; if \($pid_val\) { Stop-Process -Id $pid_val -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Processo encerrado." })

PowerShell(netstat -ano | findstr ":3001"; $pid3001 = \(netstat -ano | findstr ":3001 "\) -match "LISTENING" | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '\\s+'\)[-1] } | Select-Object -First 1; Write-Host "PID: $pid3001")

PowerShell($login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body \(@{email="admin@candeias.com"; password="admin123"} | ConvertTo-Json\) -ContentType "application/json"; $token = $login.token; $dash = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/dashboard" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; $dash | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 2 | Select-Object -First 60)

PowerShell($body = '{"email":"admin@candeias.com","password":"admin123"}'; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json"; Write-Host \($r | ConvertTo-Json\) } catch { Write-Host $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode; $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); Write-Host $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) })

PowerShell($body = '{"email":"admin@nexus.com","password":"admin123"}'; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json"; $token = $r.token; $dash = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/dashboard" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; Write-Host "funnel:"; Write-Host \($dash.funnel | ConvertTo-Json\); Write-Host "teamPerformance:"; Write-Host \($dash.teamPerformance | ConvertTo-Json\); Write-Host "monthlyEvolution count:"; Write-Host $dash.monthlyEvolution.Count)

PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "cmd" -ArgumentList "/c cd /d C:\\Users\\x\\Documents\\CandeiasNexusCRM\\frontend && npm run dev > C:\\Users\\x\\Documents\\CandeiasNexusCRM\\frontend_log.txt 2>&1" -WindowStyle Hidden)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body '{"email":"admin@nexus.com","password":"admin123"}' -ContentType "application/json"; $t = $r.token; $c = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/campaigns" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $t"}; Write-Host "Rota OK - $\($c.Count\) campanhas")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body '{"email":"admin@nexus.com","password":"admin123"}' -ContentType "application/json"; $t = $r.token; $ig = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/instagram/leads" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $t"}; Write-Host "Instagram Leads OK: $\($ig.Count\) leads"; $stats = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/instagram/stats" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $t"}; Write-Host "Stats OK: total=$\($stats.total\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body '{"email":"admin@nexus.com","password":"admin123"}' -ContentType "application/json"; $t = $r.token; $sys = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/settings/system" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $t"}; Write-Host "Sistema OK:"; Write-Host \($sys | ConvertTo-Json\); $pipe = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/settings/pipeline" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $t"}; Write-Host "Pipeline: $\($pipe.Count\) etapas"; $users = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/settings/users" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $t"}; Write-Host "Usuários: $\($users.Count\)")

PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\Users\\x\\Documents\\CandeiasNexusCRM\\backend"; Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "src/index.js" -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $r.StatusCode } catch { "Not ready: $_" })

PowerShell(taskkill /IM node.exe /F 2>$null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Set-Location "C:\\Users\\x\\Documents\\CandeiasNexusCRM\\backend"; Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "src/index.js" -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Backend OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Not ready: $_" })

PowerShell(taskkill /IM node.exe /F 2>$null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Set-Location "C:\\Users\\x\\Documents\\CandeiasNexusCRM\\backend"; $p = Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "src/index.js" -NoNewWindow -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Backend OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "ERRO: $_" })
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 4; "Frontend OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Frontend não rodando — iniciando..." })

PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\Users\\x\\Documents\\CandeiasNexusCRM\\frontend"; Start-Process -FilePath "npm" -ArgumentList "run dev" -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 6; "Frontend OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "ERRO: $_" })

PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\Users\\x\\Documents\\CandeiasNexusCRM\\frontend"; Start-Process -FilePath "cmd" -ArgumentList "/c npm run dev" -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 6; "Frontend OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "ERRO ao conectar: $_" })
